key.name: show-logo-menu
key.description: Toggle the visibility of the Logo Menu button in the top panel.

key.name: show-app-menu
key.description: Toggle the visibility of the active App Menu button in the top panel.

key.name: show-workspace-widget
key.description: Toggle the visibility of the separate workspace indicators / Activities label widget.

key.name: workspace-widget-type
key.description: Select what to display: 0 for Workspace Indicators (dots), 1 for Activities label.

key.name: show-workspace-number
key.description: Show workspace number next to Activities label when Activities button widget type is selected.

key.name: use-custom-logo
key.description: Whether to use a custom image/icon path for the Logo button.

key.name: custom-logo-path
key.description: Absolute path to custom logo image file.

key.name: logo-icon-image
key.description: Select pre-defined logo index.

key.name: symbolic-logo
key.description: Use symbolic version of pre-defined logo if available.

key.name: logo-icon-size
key.description: Size of the logo icon in pixels.

key.name: show-logo-label
key.description: Show a custom text label next to the logo.

key.name: logo-label-text
key.description: Custom label text next to the logo.

key.name: logo-click-action
key.description: Action on left click: 0 for Open Menu, 1 for Toggle Overview.

key.name: logo-middle-click-action
key.description: Action on middle click: 0 for Open Menu, 1 for Toggle Overview.

key.name: desktop-scroll
key.description: Allow scrolling mouse wheel over Logo button to switch workspaces.

key.name: show-power-options
key.description: Show Sleep, Restart, Shut Down options in the Logo Menu.

key.name: show-lockscreen
key.description: Show Lock Screen option in the Logo Menu.

key.name: hide-forcequit
key.description: Hide the Force Quit utility option in the Logo Menu.

key.name: hide-softwarecentre
key.description: Hide the Software Center option in the Logo Menu.

key.name: colored-app-menu-icon
key.description: Show the active application icon in color rather than monochrome.

key.name: enable-vibrancy
key.description: Enable macOS-style frosted glass panel vibrancy.

key.name: vibrancy-blur-mode
key.description: 1 = Linear (radius 300), 2 = Lenient (radius 150), 3 = Auto.

key.name: vibrancy-style
key.description: 0 = Off, 1 = On (Big Sur adaptive), 2 = Always Light Panel in Light Mode. Requires vibrancy-blur-mode to be active.

key.name: workspaces-in-app-grid
key.description: Show workspaces thumbnails/boxes in the application grid view.

key.name: disable-workspaces-in-app-grid
key.summary: Disable Workspace View in App Grid
key.description: Hide workspaces thumbnails/boxes in the application grid view.
